turns.speaker: UNKNOWN
turns.text: hi , susan , how is susan ?

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: good . how is the doctor ?

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: good . is susan ready to get started ?

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: yes , susan is .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: so , susan is a 26-year-old female here for a high blood pressure check . susan , what's going on with susan's blood pressure ?

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: so , susan has always struggled with , um , high blood pressure , but the high blood pressure is seeming to get really out of control lately . so , susan wanted to come in and see if there's any type of new medication susan can be on to help the high blood pressure get steady or if there is diet restrictions susan should take , um , things like that .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: okay . so , the doctor knows that the doctor has had susan on the norvasc and the doctor had to increase susan's dose , so susan is on 10 milligrams a day now . and what are susan's blood pressures running at home ? susan c- ... like , have susan's blood pressures been like over 150 ?

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: yeah , susan's blood pressures have been .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: okay . all right . and , has susan had any headaches ?

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: susan has had some headaches . susan does n't know if the headaches are just because of more stress at work or , um , because of the high blood pressure .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: okay . all right . so , susan's had some headaches . has susan had any chest pain , shortness of breath , anything like that ?

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: no , susan has had nothing like chest pain or shortness of breath .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: okay . um , and , the doctor knows that susan's had a kidney transplant a few years ago .

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: yes .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: everything is okay with the kidney transplant ?

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: everything's been good and solid with the kidney transplant .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: and is susan taking all of susan's auto , um , i- um , susan's immunosuppression medications ?

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: yes , susan is .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: all right . so , let's go ahead and the doctor and susan will do a quick physical exam . so , looking at susan , susan do n't appear any distress . susan's neck is nice and supple . susan's heart is irregular rate and rhythm . the doctor does hear a slight , uh , two out of six systolic ejection murmur . susan's lungs are clear . the doctor does see the scar on the left , uh , left plank for susan's kidney transplant which is healed . and susan has no lower extremity edema . so , let's go ahead and look at some of susan's results , okay ?

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: okay .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: hey , dragon , show the doctor the creatinine . so , susan's kidney function looks really good . so , susan's kidney function is really promising after susan's transplant . hey , dragon , show the doctor the ekg . and susan's ekg looks great , uh , perfectly normal , so that's good . um , so , the doctor's impression of susan at this time ... , let the doctor see susan's blood pressure .

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: okay .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: hey , dragon , show the doctor the blood pressure . yeah , and susan's right , it-

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: hm .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: . the blood pressure is high . so , there is something that the doctor and susan can do for the high blood pressure . so , let's go ahead and the doctor and susan will put susan on ... so , the doctor's impression of susan is that susan's , susan's blood pressure is high and the norvasc is n't controlling the blood pressure . and , you know , the doctor and susan can definitely get the blood pressure under better control . so , what the doctor would like to do is prescribe susan coreg 25 milligrams , twice a day . and coreg 25 milligrams twice a day will help bring susan's blood pressure down , okay ?

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: okay .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: hey , dragon , order carvedilol 25 milligrams , twice a day . uh , the doctor 'd also like to go ahead and , uh , get a lipid panel and some routine labs on susan just to make sure that everything is okay .

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: yeah .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: hey , dragon , order a lipid panel . hey , dragon , order a complete metabolic panel . all right . and then , um , from a transplant standpoint , everything looks fine . susan's kidney function looks great , so the doctor is just gon na continue susan on all of those medications . so , the nurse will come in soon and the nurse 'll help susan schedule all of the al- schedule a follow-up appointment with the doctor , and the doctor and susan 'll see what susan's blood pressure looks like in a couple weeks after susan takes carvedilol 25 milligrams twice a day . okay ?

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: okay .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: all right . thanks , susan .

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: thank the doctor .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: hey , dragon , finalize the note .

mentions.canonical_name: cardiovascular exam (irregular rhythm, systolic ejection murmur 2/6)

attributes.notes: High blood pressure described as 'out of control lately'.
Kidney function described as 'really good' and 'looks great' after transplant.
Norvasc is not controlling the blood pressure; plan to reassess what blood pressure looks like in a couple weeks after taking carvedilol 25 mg twice a day.
Dose was increased; Norvasc is not controlling the blood pressure.
Patient asked about a new medication to help get high blood pressure steady.
Patient asked if there are diet restrictions to help with high blood pressure control.
Patient reports having some headaches; unsure if due to stress at work or high blood pressure.
More stress at work (mentioned as possible contributor to headaches).
